summary: GCA external review status is centralized here so wallets, data platforms, reviewers, and community moderators can separate completed verification from pending external review and deferred actions.

baseScanOwnership.publicClaim: BaseScan deployer-wallet ownership verification is complete.

baseScanTokenProfile.publicClaim: The public BaseScan token profile update was returned as information-insufficient on 2026-05-13, resubmitted on 2026-05-13, and is awaiting BaseScan email/review.
baseScanTokenProfile.nextAction: Wait for BaseScan email/review; do not submit duplicates unless BaseScan asks for corrections.

blockaidMetaMask.followUpSubmissionResult: Blockaid support portal returned HTTP 200 OK
blockaidMetaMask.publicClaim: Owner reported on 2026-05-14 that no wallet risk warning was visible in the tested wallet/DEX flow. This is an owner-visible UI observation only, not a permanent security-vendor approval or cross-wallet guarantee.
blockaidMetaMask.nextAction: Keep monitoring wallet and Uniswap warning UI; do not submit duplicate reports unless Blockaid, MetaMask, or Uniswap asks for more information.
blockaidMetaMask.ownerObservationResult: No wallet risk warning was visible in the tested wallet/DEX flow.

geckoTerminal.publicClaim: GeckoTerminal token information was approved on 2026-05-11.
geckoTerminal.nextAction: Do not submit duplicate updates unless official facts change or GeckoTerminal asks for a correction.

dexScreener.publicClaim: DEX Screener can discover the live GCA/USDT pool.
dexScreener.nextAction: Keep official website, token list, GeckoTerminal data, and the GCA/USDT pool references consistent.

coinGecko.publicClaim: CoinGecko tracked listing submission is prepared but deferred.
coinGecko.nextAction: Wait for stronger public activity, legitimate liquidity depth, social presence, and exchange volume before submission.

coinMarketCap.publicClaim: CoinMarketCap tracked listing submission is prepared but deferred.
coinMarketCap.nextAction: Wait for stronger liquidity, material volume, public activity, and BaseScan profile publication before submission.

thirdPartyAudit.publicClaim: No third-party audit has been completed.
thirdPartyAudit.nextAction: Archive audit quote replies only; do not claim an external audit unless an independent report is commissioned and published.

safePublicClaims: GCA is deployed on Base Mainnet with fixed total supply.
BaseScan source and deployer-wallet ownership verification are complete.
The BaseScan token profile update was returned as information-insufficient on 2026-05-13, resubmitted on 2026-05-13, and is awaiting BaseScan email/review.
GeckoTerminal token information was approved on 2026-05-11.
The official public market route is the Base Mainnet Uniswap v4 GCA/USDT pool.
Owner reported on 2026-05-14 that no wallet risk warning was visible in the tested wallet/DEX flow.
This is an owner-visible UI observation only, not a permanent security-vendor approval or cross-wallet guarantee.
No third-party audit has been completed.
doNotClaim: BaseScan token profile approval before publication
security-vendor approval, permanent warning-free status, or cross-wallet warning removal before vendor/current wallet UI confirms it
CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap listing before publication
locked reserve before on-chain custody changes
external audit completion before an independent report is published
deep liquidity, price support, return promises, or ranking acceptance
nextActions: Wait for BaseScan email/review; do not submit duplicates unless BaseScan asks for corrections.
Keep monitoring wallet-warning UI before claiming any broader warning-free or security-vendor approval status.
Keep GCA/USDT market links, logo, whitepaper, Telegram, X, and metadata files live.
Use listing-readiness and market-quality pages before CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap submission.
Revisit third-party audit only when partner, listing, trust, or liquidity requirements justify it.
